commit.message:
Clear stale optimization metadata when establishing new baseline

Get-PerformanceBaseline.ps1 now deletes experiment-log.md,
experiment-queue.json/md, root-causes/ directory, and hone.jsonl
after database reset (Step 1.6). This prevents:
- Duplicate experiment numbers in the log across runs
- Stale queue items from prior runs being picked up
- Outdated root-cause docs being fed to the fix agent

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: enhance PPTX creative freedom and information density (#10)

* feat: enhance PPTX creative freedom and information density

- Allow custom HEX colors beyond C constants with colorMood palettes
- Move helper functions to appendix, emphasize freeform layout design
- Add composition variation examples (grid, sidebar, pyramid, etc.)
- Lower font size minimums (body 13-18pt, cards 11-14pt, min 7pt)
- Reduce line spacing from 1.4-1.5x to 1.2x
- Change density rule from '1 message per slide' to '1 theme per slide'
- Expand card limit from 2-4 to 2-6
- Default layoutApproach to hybrid, recommend dense for business
- Update Slide Master section to encourage customization

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add bullet interpretation rules per layout type

Clarify that bullets are data sources, not display format. Add
transformation table: stats→number cards, cards→split cards,
comparison→table, timeline→flow, etc. Only layout:bullets renders
as bullet list. Prevents AI from defaulting to bullet lists for
all layout types.

Fix cart quantity update causing empty-cart flash; add cart E2E tests (#69)

* Initial plan

* fix: cart quantity update no longer wipes cart state; add Playwright E2E tests

- Fix updateCartItem thunk to dispatch fetchCart() after successful PATCH
  (the API returns {success:true}, not cart data – reading data.cart gave
  undefined, resetting Redux state.cart to undefined → empty-cart flash)
- Fix cart page loading guard: only show full-page spinner on initial load
  (cart===null), not during background re-fetches from quantity updates
- Add MOCK_CART / MOCK_CART_ITEM_1 / MOCK_CART_ITEM_2 to playwright mock-data
- Add playwright-tests/cart.spec.ts with 17 comprehensive E2E scenarios
- Register 'cart' project in playwright.config.ts (admin storageState)

  claude-opus-4.6 for stronger reasoning on scope decisions

  (static fields, IMemoryCache already registered by framework),

  'Common Misclassifications to Avoid' section. Clarify that using
  framework-registered services is not a configuration change.

static in-memory cache as ARCHITECTURE, wasting an iteration.

commit.message:
feat: implement complete AI Personal Learning Assistant

- React 18 frontend with React Router v6 navigation
- Dashboard with stats cards, progress bars, course cards, recharts bar chart
- CourseAdvisor with search/filter and AI recommendations panel
- QuizSection with topic selection and multiple choice questions
- ChatAssistant with mock AI responses and quick prompts
- Home landing page with hero section and features grid
- Profile page with enrolled courses, statistics, and achievements
- FastAPI backend with CORS, courses/advisor/users/schedule routes
- SQLAlchemy database schema for Users, Courses, Enrollments
- Course recommender using TF-IDF cosine similarity
- NLP chatbot with intent detection
- Study scheduler with weekly plan generation
- 22-course dataset CSV and 55 student behavior records
- All components use mock data for standalone operation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: include address coordinates in AI system prompt

When addresses have lat/lng, format them as 'Home: Street, City
(coordinates: lat, lng)' so AI can use them for geofence creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: trigger rebuild

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use ssl-vendored to build OpenSSL from source (Windows compatible)

ssl-vendored compiles OpenSSL statically from source via cmake, so no
pre-installed OpenSSL is required. This fixes the build on Windows MSVC
where openssl-sys cannot locate an OpenSSL installation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: enable ssl feature in rdkafka to support SASL_SSL protocol

Without the ssl feature, librdkafka was compiled with WITH_SSL=0 and
WITH_SASL_SCRAM=0, causing 'Unsupported value SASL_SSL for conf' errors.

Enabling the ssl feature sets:
  WITH_SSL=1       — TLS support
  WITH_SASL_SCRAM=1 — SCRAM-SHA-256/512 over SSL support

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add SASL_SSL authentication support

Add three new auth variants for SASL over SSL (SASL_SSL security protocol):
- SaslSslPlain: SASL/PLAIN over TLS
- SaslSslScram256: SCRAM-SHA-256 over TLS
- SaslSslScram512: SCRAM-SHA-512 over TLS (most common enterprise config)

Each variant accepts username, password, and optional CA cert path
(PEM format). This matches the common Kafka enterprise setup:
  Security Type: SASL SSL
  SASL Mechanism: SCRAM-SHA-512

Note: librdkafka uses PEM certificates. If your cluster provides a
Java JKS truststore, extract the CA cert with:
  keytool -exportcert -keystore truststore.jks -alias CARoot \
    -rfc -file ca.pem

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Composio OAuth verify endpoint with polling fallback

Composio's redirectUrl parameter is unreliable — users often end up on
Composio's default success page instead of being redirected back. This adds:

- ComposioClient.get_connection_status() to poll connection state
- /api/oauth/{app}/verify endpoint that checks Composio and saves
  credentials when the connection becomes ACTIVE
- Return connectedAccountId from authorize endpoint for frontend polling

feat(profile): add callback support for extraction completion

directly to the caller instead of requiring polling.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Extract IInvitationService from IRegistrationService

Refactor invitation methods (Create, Accept, Revoke, List) into a dedicated
IInvitationService with authorization and telemetry decorators, following
the same pattern as IMfaService and IGoogleAuthService.

commit.message:
Fix keyboard input issue after Alt+mouse operations (#3254)

* Fix keyboard input issue after Alt+mouse operations

When Alt is used together with a mouse button (e.g., rectangular selection),
releasing Alt could activate the menu bar and steal keyboard focus. Detect
Alt+mouse usage and ignore the Alt key release in that case.

commit.message:
feat: consolidate tunnels, remove anonymous access, change default port to 4117

Security: Remove --allow-anonymous from tunnel creation. Dev Tunnels
account authentication is now required for all access.

Tunnel consolidation: Preview ports now use the main tunnel instead
of spawning separate devtunnel processes. Ports are dynamically
added/removed via devtunnel port create/delete.

Port change: Default server port changed from 3000 to 4117 to avoid
conflicts with common dev tools (React, Express, etc.).

- tunnel.js: Remove --allow-anonymous, add getTunnelId/addPort/removePort
- preview-manager.js: Replace spawn-based approach with port management
- index.js: Change default PORT to 4117
- Update all tests and documentation

repository.name: zpilot
repository.description: Mission control for monitoring multiple AI coding sessions in Zellij terminal multiplexer

commit.message:
feat: add zpilot up/down for daemon lifecycle

- `zpilot up` — start web dashboard as a background daemon with pidfile,
  binds to 127.0.0.1 by default (secure), use --host 0.0.0.0 for remote
- `zpilot up --open` — also opens browser
- `zpilot down` — stop the background daemon
- Idempotent: running `up` twice detects already-running server
- Logs to /tmp/zpilot/web.log, pidfile at /tmp/zpilot/web.pid

Typical workflow:
  zpilot up
  zpilot new task-1 'copilot-cli ...'
  zpilot new task-2 'copilot-cli ...'
  # disconnect, reconnect later — everything is still running
  zpilot status
  zpilot down

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: stage top-level dotnet-counters data in experiment commits

Invoke-ScaleTests.ps1 writes dotnet-counters.json and .csv to the
experiment top-level directory, but the artifact staging logic in
Apply-Suggestion, Revert-ExperimentCode, and the amend block in

committed experiments, breaking the dashboard charts beyond baseline.
